ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "firstname" TEXT /* Author's first name */,
  "middlename" TEXT /* Author's middle name */,
  "lastname" TEXT /* Author's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Author's email address */,
  "website" TEXT /* Author's personal website URL */,
  "mobile_phone" TEXT /* Author's mobile phone number */,
  "office_phone" TEXT /* Author's office phone number */,
  "home_phone" TEXT /* Author's home phone number */,
  "other_phone" TEXT /* Any additional phone numbers for the author */,
  "street" TEXT /* Author's street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Author's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Author's state */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Author's postal code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Author's country */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Author's biography */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Author's agent name */,
  "agent_email" TEXT /* Author's agent email */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Author's social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published */,
  "previous_publisher" TEXT /* Previous publisher of the book */,
  "book_reference" TEXT /* Reference link for the book */,
  "assigned_to_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher assigned to the book */,
  "num_pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "cover_type" TEXT /* Type of book cover */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the book */,
  "royalty_rate" TEXT /* Royalty rate for the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_assigned_to_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to_researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Any remarks or notes about the researcher */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Researcher's specialization */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Researcher's years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_books" (
  "author_book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the author-book relationship */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "role" TEXT /* Author's role in the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_author_books_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Publisher's address */,
  "website" TEXT /* Publisher's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_publishers" (
  "book_publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the book-publisher relationship */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher */,
  "contract_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was signed */,
  "contract_terms" TEXT /* Terms of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_publishers_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_publishers_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_genres" (
  "book_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the book-genre relationship */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_genres_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book project */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher assigned to the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_projects_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("project_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_projects_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the project manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "num_sold" INTEGER /* Number of copies sold */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue from the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_sales_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

Any remarks or notes about the researcher
